message:
fix: XML-escape text colors in Zig SVG, sync Worker SDK_TYPES

- Zig SVG: XML-escape stroke color for text elements (was unescaped,
  inconsistent with rect/ellipse which already escaped)
- Zig SVG: add explicit stroke-width to dashed rects (was missing,
  defaulting to browser SVG default of 1px)
- Worker: sync SDK_TYPES with main server — adds cloud/k8s color
  presets, addText, addLine, editing methods, full ShapeOpts/ConnectOpts
